name: Russell Dickerson
bio: Modern country-pop hitmaker known for warm, feel-good anthems about love, small-town life, and family. Signature sound: bright acoustic guitar, pedal steel warmth, polished Nashville production, earnest tenor vocals with layered harmonies. Massive streaming hits and radio dominance.
producer_notes: Corey Crowder, Casey Brown, and Josh Kerr collaborations give the clean, radio-ready polish. Use warm analog-inspired compression and subtle side-chain for that modern Nashville pump.
style_prompt: Warm modern country-pop, 118-128 BPM, bright acoustic guitar, lush pedal steel, crisp live drums, male tenor vocal earnest and heartfelt, layered gang harmonies on chorus, polished Nashville production, feel-good small-town gratitude energy
lyric_prompt: Write a warm modern country-pop song about unexpected small-town dreams coming true through love and family. Tone: sincere gratitude with gentle humor. Emotional core: love is home, not fame. Chorus is a singalong address to the heart. Vary the specific story details while staying in this exact emotional world. Under 3:30.
recommended_mixes: Pair with Thomas Rhett lyric themes for crossover family anthems

songs.title: Yours
songs.dna: Polished Nashville production with bright acoustic guitar, pedal steel swells, live drums, and lush layered harmonies. Produced by Corey Crowder. Emotional core: pure devotion. Over 1.5B streams.
songs.style_prompt: Warm modern country-pop, 120 BPM, bright acoustic guitar, pedal steel warmth, male tenor earnest and loving, layered harmonies, polished Nashville production, devotion energy
songs.lyric_prompt: Write a warm country-pop love anthem about complete devotion to one person. Tone: sincere gratitude. Chorus is a singalong declaration. Vary the specific details while keeping the emotional core of love-is-home. Under 3:30.
songs.variation_guidance: Vary the narrator’s age or specific memories while keeping the warm devotion core
songs.hook_focus: Repeatable title line with gang vocal harmonies

songs.title: Blue Tacoma
songs.dna: Upbeat country-rock groove with electric guitar riffs and pedal steel. Signature driving feel.
songs.style_prompt: Upbeat modern country-pop, 128 BPM, electric guitar riffs, pedal steel, male tenor confident, polished production
songs.lyric_prompt: Write an upbeat country-pop truck song about freedom and young love. Tone: playful confidence. Vary details while keeping the road-trip energy. Under 3:30.
songs.variation_guidance: Vary the vehicle or destination while keeping the freedom core
songs.hook_focus: Catchy title shout with gang vocals

albums.title: Yours
albums.style_prompt: 2017 polished Nashville country-pop with bright acoustics and heartfelt tenor
albums.lyric_prompt: Songs about young love turning into forever. Warm gratitude tone.

albums.title: Famous Back Home
albums.style_prompt: 2025 energetic country-pop with dance-floor swagger and reflective moments
albums.lyric_prompt: Modern life coming full circle — fame, home, and everything in between.
